text:
Y = the beneficiary has ESRD coverage 
0 = the beneficiary does not have ESRD coverage 

COMMENT: This field is new starting with MBSF ABCD V2. A beneficiary with a verified or unverified date of death 
will have a ‘N’ for any month that is after the death date. 

There are 12 monthly variables — where the 01 through 12 at the end of the variable name 
correspond with the month (e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December).
